    Prayank Jain
    Local Guide·98 opiniones·101 fotos
      Denunciar opinión
    Hace 6 meses
    I am a pilot and often away from home, so I needed a contractor I could truly rely on. Jose, Miguel and their team absolutely exceeded my expectations. From start to finish, their work was flawless, and their attention to detail was second to none. The design team delivered a vision that perfectly matched my home. The result was elegant, simple and modern.

    What impressed me most was the passion and pride they put into every step of the project. It felt like I was working with family rather than just a business. They made the entire process simple by handling everything with the HOA, getting designs approved, and turning 3D plans into reality. They even went above and beyond by painting the older side of my patio so it blended beautifully with the new work.

    Their scope of work was truly impressive. They completed ground overlay, installed new fans, handled electrical and plumbing, readjusted sprinklers, installed patio misters, painted, removed all trash and restored my backyard to perfection.

    I could not be happier with the results. Jose, Miguel and their amazing team are professional, talented and genuinely care about the quality of their work. I highly recommend them to anyone looking for a contractor who delivers excellence every time.
    Soy piloto y suelo estar fuera de casa, así que necesitaba un contratista en el que pudiera confiar plenamente. José, Miguel y su equipo superaron mis expectativas. De principio a fin, su trabajo fue impecable y su atención al detalle fue …Más
    _
    Edward Castillo
    7 opiniones·7 fotos
      Denunciar opinión
    Hace 7 meses
    We love our new patio! Fix My Home LLC made the whole process easy, from fair pricing and great financing to a stress-free build. Manuel was fantastic—no pushy sales tactics, no prying questions, just honest advice and genuine interest in our vision. Miguel (the owner) and the entire crew were responsive, skilled, and friendly, addressing any concerns within hours. The craftsmanship is top-notch, and the finished patio is exactly what we hoped for. Highly recommend.

    ¡Nos encanta nuestro nuevo patio! Fix My Home LLC hizo que todo el proceso fuera fácil: precios justos, excelente financiamiento y una construcción sin estrés. Manuel fue fantástico: nada de ventas agresivas ni preguntas incómodas, solo consejos honestos y un verdadero interés en nuestra visión. Miguel (el dueño) y todo el equipo fueron atentos, profesionales y resolvieron cualquier detalle en cuestión de horas. La calidad del trabajo es excelente y el resultado final es exactamente lo que queríamos. ¡Muy recomendados!
    _
    Eric Robinson
    7 opiniones·7 fotos
      Denunciar opinión
    Hace un año
    Carlos Martinez with Fix My Home LLC did a fantastic job extending my patio! Carlos was very respectful, professional and knowledgeable. He kept me updated daily on what would be going on during construction. His construction crews were very very skillful and kept the area of my backyard clean. At the end of each day they cleaned up and organized and stacked neatly the remaining lumber. I would highly recommend Carlos and Fix My Home LLC plus his quote was $79,000 less!!!⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
    Carlos Martínez de Fix My Home LLC hizo un trabajo fantástico ampliando mi patio. Carlos fue muy respetuoso, profesional y experto. Me mantuvo informado diariamente sobre lo que sucedería durante la construcción. Sus equipos de construcción …Más
    _

    They were amazing and super professional. Manny did an amazing job communicating with me throughout the project. Patio looks beautiful and most of all doesn’t look like a handy man did it. Will work with then again on other home projects!!!
